summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SSO (Single Sign-On) feature for ProCare Hub. All 8 backend tests passed. Both Microsoft and Google SSO buttons display correctly on login page with proper icons and 'Sign in with your organization' label. Full SSO demo flow tested successfully for both providers.
critical_code_review_comments: SSO implementation correctly uses demo mode when no credentials are configured
State parameter properly stored in MongoDB for CSRF protection
JWT tokens generated for SSO users use user ID as subject (sub) for proper /api/auth/me compatibility
Frontend correctly stores SSO state in sessionStorage for callback verification
Both SSO buttons have proper data-testid attributes for testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All SSO UI elements present and functional)

seed_data_creation: Demo SSO users created: demo.user@organization.onmicrosoft.com (Microsoft), demo.user@workspace.google.com (Google)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SSO feature fully tested in DEMO MODE. Backend endpoints: GET /api/auth/sso/microsoft/url, POST /api/auth/sso/microsoft/callback, GET /api/auth/sso/google/url, POST /api/auth/sso/google/callback. All endpoints return demo_mode: true and create demo users. Frontend SSO buttons work correctly and redirect to dashboard after successful demo authentication.

tests: GET /api/auth/sso/microsoft/url returns auth URL and state in demo mode
POST /api/auth/sso/microsoft/callback creates demo user and returns valid JWT token
microsoft_sso.ui: Microsoft SSO button displays with correct icon, clicking redirects and logs in successfully

tests: GET /api/auth/sso/google/url returns auth URL and state in demo mode
POST /api/auth/sso/google/callback creates demo user and returns valid JWT token
google_sso.ui: Google SSO button displays with correct icon, clicking redirects and logs in successfully

elements_verified: 'Sign in with your organization' label with building icon

mocked_apis_note: SSO authentication is in DEMO MODE - no real Microsoft Azure AD or Google Workspace credentials configured. Demo users are created with coordinator role.
